description: I have been using Vyond for several years and it has made our training much more engaging. Users enjoy watching the animations. It has also given us a better product as far as creating "how to" videos.
author: Eric W.
pros: Easy to use and great text-to-speech voices. It is designed so I can make a animation that looks good, or I can get more into the weeds and be creative! I also like that I have the ability to add logo's and create my own custom color swatch.
cons: Options for editing photos and images within the program. I would like to edit images in the program and not have to use a third-party software, or the ability to link it to a third-party software.

review_title: Vyond Animated Video Production No Animation Skills needed
description: Overall, the Vyond software is easy to learn and use, making it possible for anyone to create animated videos without years of training on using animation software.
author: Shirley T.
pros: Vyond has an extensive range of templates, elements, characters, and resources to make the creation of animated videos very easy, even for those without animation skills.
cons: There are some limitations in Vyond. There are limited options or features if you want to change certain motions. It would be great if we could customize the direction or extent of the motions.

review_title: A strong creative and engage tool with some minor setbacks
description: Overall Vyond is a solid tool with flexibility in video creation. With a dose of creative thinking, Vyond is great for creating engaging videos.
author: Joshua O.
pros: Vyond has some good flexibility when it comes to the types of videos and animations that can be created. The video editing is easy and it definitely helps with capturing audience engagement and attention when used creatively.
cons: Video editing can be a little slow. It takes Vyond a little bit to load and catch up to the edits that are made in each scene before they are displayed in preview. This can slow the process a little bit. Animations can also feel a little clunky when having characters transition from one animation to the next.

description: We use vyond in every project we create. I have even used it to put a character to a voiceover we had of an interview. Overall, vyond adds a great depth to our projects and engages our learners.
author: Kritsen M.
pros: You can create anything you can imagine with Vyond. The camera, actions, looping, templates, and AI are all features we use. I have even used it for video editing with success.
cons: There are some differences between scene animation and from scratch actions. I would like to be able to overlay an object with an action to a template and have them match up.

description: All of that being said, we needed to get out some informative, appealing videos out quickly for a project, and Vyond definitely allowed me to do that, with a reasonable learning curve.
author: Laura G.
pros: Some aspects of it are pretty easy to use -- if you design for the tool, it's easy to use; if you design for what you want and then try to use the tool to realize your design, it can be quite a bit trickier. I like that there's a decent built-in library of characters and actions and that the characters will appear to speak according to the audio. I did find it much easier to use, and more powerful, than our prior tool, VideoScribe (but it's also more than six times as expensive). My internal customers have been very happy with what I and others were able to create in Vyond and the whiteboard style videos were especially easy to create and publish. I also really like that Vyond has been enhancing their product...there was something that I was really wishing they had (motion pathing) when I was creating my videos last year and I've seen announcements that they've added that functionality since then. (I haven't used Vyond since the end of last year, since I've had other projects to deal with.)
cons: The biggest con is probably the cost...it's expensive for this kind of product. I also dislike that it's subscription based...I prefer apps that you purchase up front (maybe paying a bit extra for a maintenance contract to allow for upgrades). In terms of functionality, one problem is that you can't make a single video file with more than ~100 scenes (if you're using one of the non-whiteboard styles) or you'll start having problems with previewing it. You have to break it into two separate videos (which isn't easy) and then knit the published mp4 files together to make it back into one video. Given this, the product should include a little video splitter/joiner utility (instead of directing folks to use a piece of freeware, which my company won't allow us to do). I also have a laundry list of improvements that Vyond could make to their product to make it even better....for example, it desperately need visibility toggles - can't get it to stop selecting stuff I don't want when working with other stuff that's near it and it also really needs to give the user some way to see layers - can't easily move things to the right layer when there are a ton of objects in the scene. There are also no views of characters from the back -- you can sometimes "fake" this, but it's not easy with all characters/character positions. There's also no way to lock an object in position (like the bookshelves I put on the wall in the scene). I have a bunch of other suggestions, but you get the gist.
author_profession: Sr. Learning & Development Consultant, E-Learning Specialist

review_title: Simple tool adds so much value
description: Our course engagement has increased among our learners, and surveys are showing a great response to eLearnings that include Vyond videos. I've greatly enjoyed using Vyond over the years. It's one of the best tools in my training toolbox.
author: Amy C.
pros: The ability to show a concept to my learners in such a way that is engaging, and helps people who learn best with video.
cons: A format painter would be great, especially for customizing templates.

description: It's been great! My company asked if I could create animated explainer videos for them (which I've hadn't done before) but once I found this software, it was a no brainer. I've been able to create professional, clean animated videos to highlight and promote our products.
author: Erin R.
pros: The range of flexibility you have to make customizations, the ease of use, the library full of characters, props, templates, etc.
cons: Sometimes you need to be creative and think outside of the box to execute the animation you want - this may involve outside programs.

description: I’ve used it to create animated videos for use within eLearning courses, as well as standalone videos for marketing campaigns.
author: Lorie F.
pros: Vyond’s user interface makes it easy to create rich animations for use in eLearning courses and as standalone videos. It’s an excellent value for the money because not only does it have a large stock library of assets, but you can upload custom images to use as assets, which makes it very versatile. In addition, the ability to customize avatars to look like personnel at the company really increases engagement.
cons: The user interface has a bit of a learning curve, and some of its functionality, requires multiple clicks to access, so it can feel a little repetitive sometimes while editing, but it’s the price you have to pay sometimes for a plug and play application that is this powerful.

review_title: Brilliant tool, buy it now, you won't regret it!
description: Really great product and probably gets used more than any other program when developing assets with the company
author: Carl H.
pros: Absolutely brilliant peice of software!! Allows you to create videos within minutes and one you have this assets the translation side is priceless
cons: When first using it takes a while to figure out how to edit and change scenes (possibly easier using the training) however easy to grasp in a short amount of time. Some of the character animations are difficult to sync up to make it seamless

review_title: Hard to believe AI; rapid video generation; Op translations
description: Overall, this is an amazing product, I saw it demonstrated at a Learning Tech conference and frankly didn't believe what they were claiming for it. However, after seeing the results from another team in the business I lobbied hard to get it. I have not been disappointed!
author: Sarah E.
pros: Easy to create basic video content rapidly using Vyond Go, and even with non-AI Vyond, video creation is simple and intuitive. Translations are excellent, translating voiceover, captions and even text on screen. Excellent choice of music and accents. Reviewing and amending translations is easy as well - an excellent product!
cons: It can take a long time to hone and perfect a video; some of the voices are less than convincing; editing objects is awkward; there is no capacity to store pronunciations of e.g. company name.

description: We have built scenario videos which we embedded in our Articulate story, they help connect concepts with actual scenarios that our staff can connect their learning to the their work.
author: Cassandra D.
pros: We love Vyond! Gives more fun and flavor to our training, we can build out scenarios that our team can watch and engage in. User interface is intuitive and the video editing is easy.
cons: Nothing, we love it! No cons to report.No cons to report.No cons to report.No cons to report.No cons to report.

description: Used it for a few years and created training videos.
author: Leigh L.
pros: creative, loads of props and easy to use. Always improving. AI is great!
cons: Translations not the best but they are always improving.

review_title: The Best Animation Software for Instrucional Designers, Freelancers, and Business Owners
description: Vyond allows me to quickly enrich training material in an absolute impressive format. It helps me to work Agile by eliminating the need to wait for Voice Over Specialist because the HQ voice-over voices sound extremely human like. On top of that, it's an amazing tool for storytelling creation, even for gamification purposes.
author: Juan R.
pros: The animation effects are amazing, the new HQ voice-overs are impressive because they sound human like and the lip-sync is very good. The character creator could offer more options, but it certainly offers good enough variety to create a similar version of yourself or others. Combining actions like for example walking into an scene and then saying high is pretty easy to setup with motion path and you can even select in what direction the character is looking.
cons: Every time you want to Preview and scene, you have to wait a few seconds. When using it for a long time, it would be better to refresh the web browser to reduce loading. It requires a very high-speed internet connection.

description: I always depend on them for any urgent projects. They have never disappointed me so far. Its user interface is quite intuitive. The speed at which an animated video can be produced still astonishes me.
author: Ayesha J.
pros: Firstly, the quick and straightforward method. They offer sufficient templates to make a desired animated video. The extent of customisation is astounding.
cons: Comparatively speaking, the price is expensive, and more features are required. It remains one of the quickest methods for making animated videos, nevertheless.

review_title: Vyond is an excellent communication tool for public education and outreach
description: Vyond has made complicated subject matter easy to convey via animation. It is more entertaining to the public sector and keeps their attention where live video may not. The versatility of the Contemporary, Business Friendly and Whiteboard animations styles cover most any subjects or can be adapted to your needs.
author: Peter M.
pros: I love the various customization features. I am constantly discovering useful techniques via their Community website. I am so glad I chose this software for it's ease of use and fantastic support! Vyond has exceeded my expectations and foresee a continuous relationship with their knowledgeable team members. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has been in constant touch with the Vyond community and is a wonderful person who really listens and cares about my feedback!
cons: Vyond has been constantly improving and I appreciate that very much. I know some things need worked out by the development team and take some time to appear. I'd like to see a way to create folders for imported assets so I can organize them per animation. I think the timeline should scroll along with the animation's playhead. That would be very helpful to me.

review_title: If you know video editing basics, getting started with Vyond is simple
description: Vyond has helped us create videos in a way that we've never been able to do before. I have several years of video editing experience with Final Cut, Edius, and Adobe Premiere but nothing like Vyond before. This would be a feature we'd have to outsource if it weren't more affordable and intuitive for someone with my experience to figure out. It's practical and for the most part, reasonably priced.
author: Natalie T.
pros: The best feature about Vyond is its pre-made templates. They're constantly adding new ones that are more timely and relevant. The templates make it super simple for me to put together a video much faster than I would if I had to recreate something like that. My second favorite feature is replace. That makes it SO easy to truly customize existing templates for efficiency and branding purposes.
cons: Adding motion is still a sore spot for me. I don't find it easy to implement the feature in a project and it never turns out the way I'd like. I wish this part was more intuitive. And I'd like to see more templates, although I mentioned there are a lot and I enjoy them, I'd like to see more added more regularly. Also, for the price that you pay for a subscription, you should be able to have at least two users.

description: Easy to use. Employees love kearning using this tool.
author: Christina L.
pros: I love the drag and drop functionality and the library of assets. This is the best explainer software there is. It has templates, prebuilt characters, music, text-to-speech, whiteboard animations, and you can even build your own characters.
cons: It's very expensive. I have a side hobby/business where I sell learning games. My games are sold for no more than $5 each. If I want to incorrect a Vyond video, I would have to pay an additional $100 for each video I sell. This is in addition to the subscription. Needless to say, Vyond doesn't fit my purpose in tjis context. My company pays for Vyond for me to create internal training videos and it works well for that purpose. Employees love quickbexplainer videos instead of long web-based training modules.

description: Exceptional. I am a power user of this product and it is by far and away the best visual storytelling tool for distilling fine-grain concepts into high-level education.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Features of TTS (text to speech Amazon Polly) as well as customizable options.
cons: 255 character limit in TTS foreign language captures. It makes for laborious back and forth when you are working with voice-over scripts of 1-3 minutes.

author: Deborah S.
pros: I LOVE using Vyond. It allows me to create videos easily and quickly. I can animate on-screen characters easily and the software allows me to use a text-to-screen dialog that will animate the characters so it looks like the characters are speaking. In addition, support is great - I ask a question and get answers quickly.
cons: Not being able to start a small scene in the middle as I create the video (that consists of a number of scenes). Being able to do so would allow me to adjust the dialog and animation a bit easier (no need to go through each scene again and again to adjust something towards the end).

review_title: VYOND Makes Learning Better, Easier, More FUN, and Effective
description: I love it. Everyone who sees the end result loves to engage with the content.
author: Elizabeth B.
pros: I love that Vyond can take even the dryest content and make it sparkle! Every week there are improvements that make it easier to use and adds great elements to make things pop! The templates are hugely helpful in learning and there is a TON of great customer support through webinars and learning.
cons: My one request for the developers is... when replacing characters, it would be amazing if you didn't have to reset their actions all the time. It would be nice if you could substitute characters and they would take on the same effects as the one you are swapping them out for. It would be A HUGE time saver.

review_title: Animated Videos made Quick and Easy!
description: I used this software to create engaging animated video's for various business requests.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The feature i enjoyed the most is the timeline that allows me to view without having to leave the editor page. I that the developers of the software take their user feedback and recommendations into account when rolling out updates.
cons: Its not much of an issue, but if a desktop application can be developed that will allow me to save an offline copy of the project and not rely to much on the internet.

author: Progyamita "Reema" B.
pros: We learn better when we can make a connection. Digital storytelling with Vyond is at its best. During my tenure at a previous job, I used it to create small stories of discrimination that were easy for the learners to resonate with rather than reading a scenario. I have used Vyond to demonstrate how functions like how does the web works? No matter what your end goal is, Vyond brings it to life. Gives the content meaning and ease of understanding for the learners.
cons: As much as I love the fact there is no installation needed to get started with Vyond, but at times I think the speed of the internet (especially when we are all working from home) creates a few hiccups at times.

review_title: Perfect tool for our businesses that help in making interactive and animated video with zero technic
description: Vyond is a video platform that allows us to create, edit and then share video stories with our audience. Vyond is the perfect tool for businesses looking to create animated, interactive videos without any technical skills or expensive software. Whether you are an individual or a business, you can use Vyond to add an extra dimension of interactivity to your videos and engage your audience.
author: Dip K.
pros: working with Vyond has helped us to build a brand of our own, as well as identify and define how we want to be seen through an eye-catching animation videos. The platform has helped us to create a unique brand and visual style for our content, and we look forward to continuing to grow our brand through the platform.
cons: Vyond is a highly intuitive platform that enables us to create animated videos, explainer videos, whiteboard videos, and more.

description: We use it for so many different things, small learning moments, scenarios, and video explanations. It really gets the job done and shows something the learner wants to pay attention to.
author: Michaela W.
pros: This software is by far one of the easiest softwares to use, learn, and create absolutely brilliant and engaging work. I absolutely love how great everything looks and the sky is really the limit with what you can do.
cons: The only thing I don't like about it is that you can't make the background invisible and it doesn't have specific dimensions in the software. I'd like the ability to remove the background to put them in my eLearnings and have the video be different sizes.

review_title: Much more than an EXPLAINER VIDEO CREATOR
description: Vyond is extremely powerful and allows for animation videos to be created in a fraction of the time it would take to create in another tool like After Effects.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Vyond features an easy to use 2d animation editor. With a mix of templates, pre-built scenes and the ability to upload your own images, it can service all your animation video needs.
cons: The ONLY thing that I dislike about vyond is the inability to export individual assets in high-res. Sometimes it might be useful to export a character for a powerpoint deck, but you have to export a gif or other non-high res version.
